code: export const formatCurrency=amount=>{return new Intl.NumberFormat('en-US',{style:'currency',currency:'USD',minimumFractionDigits:0,maximumFractionDigits:0}).format(amount||0);};export const formatPercentage=rate=>{return new Intl.NumberFormat('en-US',{style:'percent',minimumFractionDigits:2,maximumFractionDigits:2}).format(rate||0);};export const formatSSN=value=>{const cleaned=value.replace(/\D/g,'');const match=cleaned.match(/^(\d{0,3})(\d{0,2})(\d{0,4})$/);if(!match)return cleaned;let formatted=match[1];if(match[2])formatted+='-'+match[2];if(match[3])formatted+='-'+match[3];return formatted;};
